donateFormIntro: Use our secure form for a one-off or regular gift. Every pound helps us keep compassionate care free for local families.
heroImageAlt: People supported in our day hospice and community
heroDescription: Your gifts help us fund specialist palliative nurses, wellbeing activities, transport, and family support — so care stays free for everyone who needs us across Leicestershire, Nottinghamshire and Lincolnshire.
aboutParagraph1: Every year it costs more than £705,000 to run our hospice services. We do not charge for most of the care we provide, so donations and gifts in wills are how we keep going.
aboutParagraph2: Whether you give £5 or £500, your support means we can plan ahead, invest in our team, and say “yes” to families at the times that matter most.
impactHeading: What your donation could help provide
impactLede: These are examples of what your generosity can make possible — every gift helps us keep our services accessible.

impactCards.title: A home-cooked meal
impactCards.description: A gift of £15 could help provide a guest with a nourishing lunch and a friendly face at our day hospice.

impactCards.title: Dementia support
impactCards.description: A gift of £50 could help fund companionship sessions and practical help for families living with dementia.

impactCards.title: Nursing care
impactCards.description: A gift of £200 could help cover specialist nursing time in the community, when people need us most.

impactCards.title: Memory Meadow
impactCards.description: Dedicate a flower for £40 to remember someone special and help care for others in their name.

suggestedMethods.body: Use our secure form for a one-off or regular gift — every pound goes towards patient care and family support.
Monthly gifts help us plan with confidence; you can change or stop at any time.
Call us on 01949 860303 — we’re happy to help you set up a gift or answer questions.
Dove Cottage Day Hospice, Canal Lane, Stathern, Melton Mowbray, LE14 4EX — cheques and cash welcome in person.
